title: ICON Lab Research Website
description: Build a static research lab website (HTML+CSS+JS) for ICON Lab at Dankook University, styled after yongchae.com, with content from Google Sites

stories.title: Project structure and shared layout
acceptanceCriteria: index.html exists and is valid HTML5
css/style.css exists with CSS custom properties for colors, typography, spacing matching yongchae style
js/main.js exists with theme toggle and mobile nav functionality
Navigation includes: Home, Research, Publications, Members, Teaching, Contact
Language toggle (KR/EN) in nav bar switches between /ko/ and root paths
Dark mode toggle works and persists via localStorage
Mobile hamburger menu appears at <=768px breakpoint
Footer includes lab name, address, email, phone

stories.title: Home page with hero and lab introduction
acceptanceCriteria: index.html has hero section with ICON Lab name, tagline, and institution
Lab introduction section with mission statement text
Research areas overview section with visual cards or icons
Selected publications section showing top 3-4 papers
Fade-in scroll animations using Intersection Observer
Page is responsive: stacks vertically on mobile

stories.title: Research page
acceptanceCriteria: research.html exists with research area cards
data/research.json contains research topics with descriptions
Cards rendered dynamically from JSON data
Research areas include: 3D point cloud, deep learning, scaffold safety, UAV, digital twin, robotics
Page is responsive

stories.title: Publications page
acceptanceCriteria: publications.html exists with categorized publication listings
data/publications.json contains all publications from ICON Lab site
Publications rendered dynamically from JSON
Sections: SCIE Journals, International Conferences, Domestic Conferences, Patents, Software Registrations
Each publication shows authors, year, title, venue
Page is responsive

stories.title: Members page
acceptanceCriteria: members.html exists with professor and student sections
data/members.json contains member data
Professor section shows full profile: name, title, education, experience, email
Students section shows undergraduate interns with names and affiliations
Graduate students section shows recruiting message
Page is responsive

stories.title: Teaching and Contact pages
acceptanceCriteria: teaching.html exists with semester-organized course tables
contact.html exists with address, phone, email, and embedded map placeholder
Teaching data includes Spring 2026 and Fall 2025 courses
Contact shows both Korean and English addresses
Pages are responsive

stories.title: Korean language pages
acceptanceCriteria: ko/ directory exists with Korean versions of all pages
Korean pages have identical structure but Korean UI text
Language toggle from Korean pages links back to English root pages
Navigation labels in Korean: 홈, 연구, 논문, 구성원, 강의, 연락처

stories.title: GitHub Pages deployment readiness
acceptanceCriteria: All internal links use relative paths (no absolute URLs)
No server-side dependencies (pure static files)
All pages open correctly when served from file system or static server
favicon.svg or favicon.ico exists
